title: server: duplicate link-local check in is_private_ip
description: server.rs:is_private_ip, IPv4 branch: calls v4.is_link_local() and also checks 'v4.octets()[0] == 169 && v4.octets()[1] == 254' — these are identical (is_link_local() covers exactly 169.254.0.0/16 on stable Rust). The manual octets check is dead code. Clippy -D clippy::nonminimal_bool would catch this. Fix: remove the redundant octets check.
